textByHashes.61f3357363b108e2bd1c1575a8f8c24e29f85a68: Naarrr, can't say I have laddie.
textByHashes.57224944ad502115f00f87e3c07a36b425532b06: Naarrr, can't say I have lassie.
textByHashes.aa2789eee40b740b9709ce72e3466e8e89f49d09: [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh]! This poor laddie is sailing a cursed voyage and ye be suggestin' lucky charms?!
textByHashes.e9c6183f96973bbe704ce7df148e21692a9264ed: [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh]! This poor lassie is sailing a cursed voyage and ye be suggestin' lucky charms?!
textByHashes.3310d5b91b3c8e4c441858fa8a7dceec699cd873: [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh]! This poor young'un is sailing a cursed voyage and ye be suggestin' lucky charms?!
textByHashes.270661f225642bb293436bbc23434afa4cf28f06: Listen here, laddie. There be no way out of a cursed voyage, however, there are ways one can make it through unscathed...
textByHashes.eb78378e8939158540ad5cd671c719f3d3f40e92: Listen here, lassie. There be no way out of a cursed voyage, however, there are ways one can make it through unscathed...
textByHashes.09f80d7751e24da43e873af2d9703dafc8f68921: Listen here, young'un. There be no way out of a cursed voyage, however, there are ways one can make it through unscathed...
textByHashes.d0d09fdb2338d45bbd53560d2549f92d575ea6b5: Take no notice of him. I just thought it be worth ye knowing all the options is all.
textByHashes.14aa0a92c3713918782d964b6568e3790c61a91c: Folk be tellin' tales of a special potion... A 'potion of sealegs' they be callin' it.
textByHashes.cf9d1da35870b3b8a97e4401830de6999bd5bade: Aye. The crew simply drink the potion before they be settin' sail, and the next thing they know, they be safely at their destination!
textByHashes.24fedd686b68901a8ed85d7a9cf529417ac750de: Arrr, matey, ye canna be serious! That be the home of Elvarg the Dragon!
textByHashes.aff5ccab33a4c091469ddbe20ce1b0b3ff2c8b46: I canna help ye. And right sorry I be to see a fine young laddie like yerself go off to yer doom.
textByHashes.d1383095345c43cb89b29c94f6a4a90e1ad7b8d6: I canna help ye. And right sorry I be to see a fine young lassie like yerself go off to yer doom.
textByHashes.a93e58e391e33e76b56aa09198a4b9c27f33b9e2: I canna help ye. And right sorry I be to see a fine young 'un like yerself go off to yer doom.
textByHashes.983b755a0b2ca23828b83c172c21d777270fd948: Redbeard Frank ye say? He be outside. Says he likes the feel of the wind on his cheeks.
textByHashes.0198b7476525c122141ec94b651f44f9ee55ba21: Aye, I am. I canna walk, ye see.
textByHashes.79c827f614ac617e41d9b2c4016564e09eaebc24: Arrr, I 'ave only the one leg! I lost its twin when my last ship went down.
textByHashes.f4e0fb4946884be60bc5402379d4211157e06211: Nay, young laddie, this be a false leg. For years I had me a sturdy wooden peg-leg, but now I wear this dainty little feller.
textByHashes.aa7c5a28e4bbcbbdf1c077c08de35ef572c11062: Nay, young lassie, this be a false leg. For years I had me a sturdy wooden peg-leg, but now I wear this dainty little feller.
textByHashes.3372679955e0c15be190ab4513fa6ffb9ae1d4a1: Yon peg-leg kept getting stuck in the floorboards.
textByHashes.cffceb6a352b6023792c780f9975b26ec206a810: Perhaps a bright young laddie like yerself would like to help me? I be needing another ship to go a-hunting my enemy.
textByHashes.1ee65be9f01ba50b414923bb47930a65f3a45163: Perhaps a bonnie young lassie like yerself would like to help me? I be needing another ship to go a-hunting my enemy.
textByHashes.e3f48a7276e33cac409ec2d18e76bddd427901ff: Arrr! That ship be known to me, and a fine lass she is.
textByHashes.f5385cec0da0813982d04212bdfc0b77d13ce18a: So would ye be kind enough to let me take her out to sea?
textByHashes.a189055c0cea0bce6df326cd88e58ab8c3ae5d9d: Nay, I have nary a penny to my name. All my worldly goods went down with me old ship.
textByHashes.8653698e3d72e4a4d6383e5d67ccbb5fdb0cad0f: Arrr! Would ye be so kind?
textByHashes.68f72b3b5153f32ce52e64fe27dfc2b65caa9eac: Nothin' at the moment, but then again the Customs Agents are on the warpath right now.
textByHashes.9b6f866205f20b4f803878fd6be7061e4b640d65: Oi matey, leave my beer alone!
textByHashes.60eca7b6c5e1c245d451c693b4017d80966cb875: Oi matey, no casting spells on my beer!
